title: Reconnect-safe USB peripheral remediation
prompt: Repair the fixture-backed Bash USB diagnostic so that remediating SCANNER-001 changes only that physical peripheral. The tool must continue to report enumeration, power, driver, device-node permissions, and application-claim state; it must identify the target by its stable serial when bus/device numbers and hidraw paths change after reconnect; and it must leave every peer device byte-for-byte unchanged. Make the least local source repair. Do not modify tests or fixtures. Run `bash tests/run-tests.sh` to verify the result.
